title: Consolidate platform-spec and stabilize website container build

source.subject: consolidate platform-spec cutover and stabilize website container build

body:
## Outcome

Consolidate platform-spec cutover and stabilize website container build.

## Context

- Workstream **platform-spec** — normative spec on beskid-lang.org.
- Contributes to deliverable **Platform-spec cutover** (`v02-platform-spec-cutover`).
- Normative updates live under `site/website/src/content/docs/platform-spec/` and ship via beskid-lang.org.

## Platform specification

- Tracks normative content in [Platform specification](https://beskid-lang.org/platform-spec/) (`/platform-spec/`) *(required)*

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`19745d4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/19745d4) — consolidate platform-spec cutover and stabilize website container build
